pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_qgis.sh:61-85 and setup_task.sh:26-50. File is generated/regenerated as part of environment setup.
Confirmed in task description (task.json:5) and export_result.sh:17. Directory creation verified in setup_task.sh:9.
Confirmed in task description (task.json:5) and export_result.sh:18-19 (also accepts .qgz). Directory creation verified in setup_task.sh:10.

Confirmed in GeoJSON source data. Area A has area_sqkm: 10.5 (setup_qgis.sh:69, setup_task.sh:34). Area B has area_sqkm: 8.2 (setup_qgis.sh:77, setup_task.sh:42). These are the values to be burned into raster pixels via the 'area_sqkm' field.

Confirmed in task description (task.json:5 'Set Assign a specified nodata value to -9999'). Also referenced as fallback assumption in export_result.sh:126. Standard GDAL/QGIS parameter (-a_nodata in gdal_rasterize).

Confirmed in task description (task.json:5 'Set output resolution to 0.005 for both horizontal and vertical'). Units are degrees (georeferenced units for EPSG:4326). At this resolution, 0.6 degree width becomes 120 pixels, 0.3 degree height becomes 60 pixels. Matches GDAL gdal_rasterize -tr parameter.

Confirmed in task description (task.json:5 'in CRS EPSG:4326'). GeoJSON CRS field uses 'urn:ogc:def:crs:OGC:1.3:CRS84' which is the OGC-named variant of EPSG:4326/WGS84 (verified via GitHub GDAL issues and OGC standards). Coordinates are in [longitude, latitude] order as per GeoJSON standard.
Extracted from GeoJSON coordinates in setup_qgis.sh:72 and :80 (Area A: lon -122.5 to -122.2, Area B: lon -122.2 to -121.9; both lat 37.5 to 37.8). Location: San Francisco Bay Area, California.
Confirmed in GeoJSON: Feature 1 ('Area A') and Feature 2 ('Area B'). Task description confirms 'two polygon features'.
Confirmed in GeoJSON setup_qgis.sh:69 ('Area A'), :77 ('Area B'). Also referenced in task description (task.json:5).

privileged_info_summary: The task converts a synthetic GeoJSON polygon layer (sample_polygon.geojson) containing two features ('Area A' with area_sqkm=10.5, 'Area B' with area_sqkm=8.2) into a raster GeoTIFF using QGIS's Rasterize tool. Data is synthetic, generated in setup_qgis.sh (lines 61-85). Input layer is in EPSG:4326 (WGS84), extent spans approximately -122.5 to -121.9 degrees longitude and 37.5 to 37.8 degrees latitude (San Francisco Bay Area). Expected output: polygon_raster.tif with 0.005-degree resolution (120x60 pixels), nodata value -9999, pixel values burned from area_sqkm field (10.5 and 8.2). QGIS project should be saved as rasterize_project.qgs. All metadata values are consistent with task requirements and verified against GDAL/QGIS documentation.
